description: Omega known-bug catalog. Each entry drives one sentinel check. status_at_last_audit reflects observed engine state, not git blame.

bugs.title: MLB/NHL def_rating inverted in _sim_baseball/_sim_hockey
bugs.description: home_lambda formula inverted: used league_avg_rpg / away_def instead of away_def / league_avg_rpg, causing good defenses to inflate opponent run expectations.
bugs.workaround: Suppress MLB/NHL game-line Bet Cards if bug_present

bugs.title: MLB draw_prob leak emitting ~13% despite supports_draw=False
bugs.description: Baseball traces reported ~13% draw_prob, deflating home/away win probs because tie samples were not being re-allocated via _allocate_ties.
bugs.fix_direction: _allocate_ties() re-assigns tie samples; reported_draws is set to 0.
bugs.workaround: None needed if fixed; if bug_present then home+away win probs are deflated ~13pp.

bugs.title: Prop traces missing game identity fields in input_snapshot (BUG-4 recurrence)
bugs.description: analyze() prop traces omitted player_name, home_team, away_team, game_date, prop_type, line from input_snapshot. ingest_traces.py rejects bet_records on traces with missing identity.
bugs.fix_direction: PersistableTrace.from_analyze_output() pulls identity fields into input_snapshot.
bugs.workaround: If bug_present: copy identity fields from result into input_snapshot before ingest.

bugs.title: Evidence adjustment policy in shadow mode — signals computed but not applied
bugs.description: The active AdjustmentPolicy has mode=shadow. Evidence signals including win_streak and series_lead are computed and recorded but do NOT modify simulation inputs. This is current design state.

check.note: bug_present when mode != live; signals are audited/scored but have zero effect on sim

bugs.fix_direction: Promote policy to mode=live via scripts/promote_adjustment_policy.py after shadow review validates signal accuracy.
bugs.workaround: Note in reasoning_downgrade_rationale that evidence signals are recorded but not applied.

bugs.title: SQLite WAL mode fails on FUSE/CIFS network mount
bugs.description: TraceStore.persist() and all scripts that open omega_traces.db fail when the DB is on the FUSE mount. WAL mode needs to create/delete -wal and -shm sidecars; FUSE denies deletion.

check.note: Uses a temp file probe to avoid touching the real DB

bugs.fix_direction: Run all TraceStore scripts against a local /tmp copy: cp omega_traces.db /tmp/omega_traces.db && export OMEGA_TRACE_DB=/tmp/omega_traces.db
bugs.workaround: cp omega_traces.db /tmp/omega_traces.db; use --db /tmp/omega_traces.db on all scripts

bugs.title: --repair-from-git no-op on FUSE mount
bugs.description: cowork_preflight.py --repair-from-git exits without actually restoring corrupt files because git checkout writes do not invalidate the FUSE mount cache.

check.note: Cannot automate: requires a live FUSE mount with a corrupt file to trigger and verify. Always returns unknown.
check.manual_test: Run preflight --repair-from-git on a deliberately truncated tracked file and verify content changed on disk.

bugs.fix_direction: Fix repair path to shell out to subprocess git checkout then os.sync().
bugs.workaround: for f in <files>; do git cat-file -p "HEAD:$f" > /tmp/_$(basename $f) && cp /tmp/_$(basename $f) "$f"; done
